feedback.text: Dear madam or sir, i write this feedback to ask for the inclusion of video game purchases in the Digital Fairness Act. Currently such purchases often provide the software as a service that can be suspended at any time by the company, even though the product could still operate in an offline capacity. Often companies abuse of their EULA to shut down purchased games to the detriment of the end user even though at a technical level those products could still run either offline or on fan made servers. Their resoning is quite simple, they don't wish to spend more money on the game infrastucture so if something is seen as non profitable the end consumer looses. While i may not be good at describing the problem in detail, please check out the recently concluded petition regarding this very topic.
